name: Veggie Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 cup vegetable pieces (broccoli, cauliflower, mushrooms, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs into yolks and whites. Whisk the yolks.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the yogurt, egg yolks, and diced cheese until combined.
3. Preheat the oven to 325°F (163°C).
4. In a large skillet, sauté the onion and vegetable pieces over medium heat until tender.
5. Stir in the herbs.
6. Add the cheese mixture to the sautéed vegetables.
7. Gently fold in the egg whites to the yogurt mixture.
8. Pour the combined ingredients into a pie crust pan.
9. Bake for 45 minutes, or until set.
